LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DANIEL GOTTRON'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGE THAT MR. GOTTRON ACTED WITH WILLFUL AND CONSCIOUS DISREGARD FOR THE RIGHTS AND SAFETY OF OTHERS TO SUPPORT AN AWARD OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES. MR. TOLES IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING VERBATIM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cassady Toles of Kern Noda Devine & Segal telephone number 415-474-1900 for Plaintiff Tony Van Nguyen.
Nancy allard of Law Offices of Shahin Karin telephone number 925-977-1400 for Defendant Daniel Gottron.

Ms. Allard withdrew their contest. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DANIEL GOTTRON'S MOTION TO STRIKE the punitive damages allegations in the complaint is denied. Plaintiffs sufficiently allege that Mr. Gottron acted with willful and conscious disregard for the rights and safety of others to support an award of punitive damages. Mr. Toles is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
